subIdleSource: The primary biometric signature used for verification.
subLoading: Running face comparison via Verifik API…
captureHint: Use the live camera below or upload a photo. One image is enough.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this step.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
apiRefBody: Verifik's public pages may describe extra fields for other environments. This HumanAuthn demo calls the OpenCV route that accepts gallery, probe, and optional compare_min_score only.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Compares probe image(s) to gallery image(s) and returns a similarity score. The backend sets passed when the score meets your compare_min_score (or the server default when omitted).
paramGalleryDesc: Reference face(s), base64 (no data URL prefix)
bulletShortB64: Images must be real base64 payloads. Very short strings are rejected (for example 412:only_images_in_base64).
bulletSlider: The Compare minimum score slider sets compare_min_score on the request (0.67 to 0.95; starts at the API client default {defaultScore}).
bulletResponseShape: Responses often include id and a signature block alongside data.
fallbackMatch: The two faces belong to the same person.
fallbackNoMatch: The faces appear to be different individuals.
engineBlock:
ENGINE: HumanAuthn
PROTO: FACE_CMP
AUTH: PENDING
mustSignIn: You must be signed in to run this demo.
